name: clearance-required
description: A strong skills match that is hard-blocked by a security-clearance + US-citizenship requirement — must score exactly 1, no matter how well the résumé fits (ADR 0030).
resume: Alex Rivera — Senior Backend Engineer. 8 years building distributed systems in Go and Python, Kubernetes, AWS, gRPC, and high-throughput data pipelines. Led platform teams and on-call.

job.title: Senior Backend Engineer
job.full_description: We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build mission-critical services in Go and Python on Kubernetes/AWS. 7+ years required. U.S. Citizenship is required and you must hold an active TS/SCI security clearance — this is a non-negotiable government contract requirement. Strong distributed-systems and gRPC experience expected.
